analysis.task_response_analysis: Detailed assessment of task address, position clarity, and idea development with specific evidence. For letters: assess purpose, tone, bullet point coverage, and format.
analysis.coherence_analysis: Detailed assessment of organisation, progression, cohesion, and paragraphing with specific evidence. For letters: assess letter structure, opening/closing, logical flow.
analysis.lexical_analysis: Detailed assessment of vocabulary range, precision, less common items, and collocation with specific evidence. For letters: assess register appropriateness.
analysis.grammar_analysis: Detailed assessment of sentence variety, structural control, and error patterns with specific evidence

taskResponse.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded.

coherenceCohesion.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded.

lexicalResource.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded.

grammaticalRange.bandJustification: Explain why this band was chosen and why higher band was not awarded.

overallFeedback: Overall feedback paragraph summarizing main strengths and areas for improvement.
bandJustification: Overall explanation of why these bands were assigned.
bandBoundarySummary: Summary of any boundary cases across all criteria.
confidenceReason: Explain factors influencing your confidence level.
strengthSummary: Brief summary of the essay's key strengths.
weaknessSummary: Brief summary of the essay's main weaknesses.
improvementPriority: 1. Most important improvement with specific action.
